body_txt:
When you think about dangerous fish, you would probably think sharks , or maybe piranha in river waters. But that's not to say other fish can't be threatening, creepy, or outright terrifying.
For example, the goofy-looking catfish can grow to be absolutely humongous and can be more than strong enough to drown human adults if they so wish. Understandably quite frequent in Under the Sea settings, where they can make quite the basic enemy to be faced , especially in video games. They may also be one of the hazards of an Eldritch Ocean Abyss , some of which may be alien enough to cross over into an Animalistic Abomination . Super-Trope to: Examples of these should go on their respective pages. See also Swordfish Sabre , which can be wielded by fish or man, and Sea Monster . Compare Feathered Fiend ("general" evil bird trope), Never Smile at a Crocodile , Devious Dolphins , Monstrous Seal , Monster Whale , Wily Walrus , Giant Enemy Crab , Sea Serpents and Tentacled Terror for scary non-fish aquatic animals.
